title: Data for "Mixed viral infection constrains the genome formula of multipartite cucumber mosaic virus"
author: Dieke Boezen
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We performed a study to assess the effect of mixed infection on the genome formula of multipartite virus CMV. We used qPCR to determine genome formulas and titer. Additionally, simulation models were developed to describe mechanisms for genome formula change under mixed infection.
steps_raw: We performed a study to assess the effect of mixed infection on the genome formula of multipartite virus CMV. We used qPCR to determine genome formulas and titer. Additionally, simulation models were developed to describe mechanisms for genome formula change under mixed infection.
